title: cynoglossum cheranganiense
intro: Cynoglossum cheranganiense, also known as Cherangani Hound's Tongue, is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae, native to Kenya and Tanzania. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cynoglossum cheranganiense include treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as promoting wound healing and reducing inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, often used to treat a variety of ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
